supersedes: v0.1 (AUDIT REQUIRED: retrieve() silent-drop, open_gaps-grounding overclaim, load_corpus self-ref default, unpassed superseded=, unassessed 48K call)
note: Standalone adapter + one call to the EXISTING answer contract. Creates NO Claim, touches NO admission gate, adds NO always-on observer. Format + provenance-preserving wiring only. v0.2 hardens the 5 audit findings.

reused_current_code.answer_question: egl/self_grounding.py:254 answer_question(question, records=None, superseded=None, system=None, k=8, record_char_limit=1400, max_tokens=1200, force_include=None) -> (answer_dict, retrieved_ids, raw).
reused_current_code.force_include: egl/self_grounding.py:262-267 appends by_id[rid] for rid in force_include not already in hits -> defeats retrieve() score>0 filter.
reused_current_code.retrieved_ids: egl/self_grounding.py:274 returns [r['record_id'] for r in hits] -> usable for a coverage assertion.
reused_current_code.validate_answer: egl/self_grounding.py:296 (M1 grounds answer_claims/source_trace via record_ids; only COUNTS open_gaps).
reused_current_code.records_block: egl/self_grounding.py:242 _records_block reads r['record_id'], r['source_class'], r['ordinal'], r['text'].

constructs.name: frozen source boundary
constructs.site: read pinned scheduler_exhibit_candidates.json records where incident=='HBB-30'; iterate candidates with cand_idx
constructs.present_criterion: reads only the pinned artifact; no regeneration; no scorer/rubric read
constructs.invalid_if: re-runs exhibit, reads scorer/rubric/target, or reads a live-growing ledger

constructs.name: provenance identity
constructs.present_criterion: mirrors exhibit opaque_id; no fabricated run_id/parent_ref
constructs.invalid_if: invents a field absent in the source

constructs.name: format-only adapter
constructs.site: candidate str -> {record_id, source_class='HBB_EXHIBIT_INTERMEDIATE', ordinal, text=candidate byte-identical, provenance=source_ref}
constructs.invalid_if: emits any judgement field, mutates text, or attaches a rubric label

constructs.name: existing answer contract + FIX-1 coverage
constructs.site: answer_question(question=t0_stuck_frame, records=adapted, system=NEUTRAL, k=len(records), force_include=[all record_ids], superseded={}) -> (answer, retrieved_ids, raw); assert set(retrieved_ids)==set(all_ids) else log+FAIL; validate_answer(answer,{ids})
constructs.present_criterion: answer_question unchanged; force_include guarantees all records fed; coverage asserted+logged; superseded={} passed; validate_answer run
constructs.invalid_if: answer_question modified, open_gaps hand-written, coverage unasserted, or validate_answer skipped

constructs.name: FIX-2 no self-reference default
constructs.site: assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records)>0 before the call; never pass records=None
constructs.present_criterion: records is a non-empty list; load_corpus() default never triggered (no EGL ledger self-reference, DE-0132)
constructs.invalid_if: records=None reachable, or EGL ledgers enter the corpus

constructs.name: neutral system prompt (no rubric)
constructs.site: system = 'given generated intermediate RECORDS, return answer_claims + open_gaps; ONLY provided records; cite record_ids in source_trace; JSON with ANSWER_KEYS'
constructs.present_criterion: NO DETECTION/RECONSTRUCTION/6x-correct/REC2/rubric vocabulary; NO correctness-scoring; forbids outside knowledge
constructs.invalid_if: any rubric token, correctness/answer-key instruction, or 'is this right' framing

constructs.name: honest reach (FIX-3)
constructs.site: outputs answer_claims + open_gaps only; open_gaps documented as answerer-produced NOT mechanically grounded
constructs.present_criterion: does NOT claim open_gaps is validate_answer-grounded; does NOT populate status/validation_mode/non_guarantees; does NOT call apply_outcome/gates.decide
constructs.invalid_if: reasserts open_gaps grounding, or forges a Claim/status/validation_mode/non_guarantees

constructs.name: normal-path isolation
constructs.site: adapter invoked explicitly from HBB/exhibit side; ordinary EGL question flow untouched
constructs.present_criterion: no classifier/heuristic/always-on observer on normal path; normal path byte-unchanged (T8)
constructs.invalid_if: an always-on hook, query classifier, or auto-surface added to ordinary questions

constructs.name: snapshot pin + FIX-5 sizing
constructs.site: assert sha256(scheduler_exhibit_candidates.json)==b7c98296...; corpus = ONLY exhibit material; 1 call if ctx>=~64K else per-condition batching (<=4 calls, logged)
constructs.present_criterion: input pinned; no EGL-ledger self-reference; call sizing stated with logged fallback
constructs.invalid_if: input read live/unpinned, EGL ledgers fed, or a >context-window call issued without the logged batching fallback

authority_invariants.retained_ne_evidence: records are answer-layer inputs, not admitted evidence
authority_invariants.open_gap_ne_false_premise: open_gaps non-authoritative; no premise marked false
authority_invariants.answer_authority_unchanged: answer_question has no SoR write (no append_event in self_grounding.py)
authority_invariants.user_final_authority: gates.py:2-3 LLM no DB write; user 裁定

primary_outcome: answer_claims + open_gaps produced from HBB-30 intermediate material via the existing answer contract, answer_claims source-trace grounded, all records provably fed (coverage assert), all 8 authority invariants held.
acceptance_gate: independent re-audit confirms B-SRC/B-ID/B-ADAPT/B-TGT/B-GUARD/B-SYS/B-FLOW/B-ISO/B-PIN + invariants + no-bypass + no-rubric + FIX-1..5 BEFORE implementation.
status: DESIGN BINDING v0.2 DRAFTED — awaiting independent re-audit; implementation/run/commit held.
